comment: Recently got a new phone running Android 10 and I really dislike how the new "tap to translate" button works now. Before, it would conveniently only appear for a few seconds when you copied some text. Now it's always there and gets in the way... It was something I used daily before and was a great feature. It's useless now unless you want to have it on your screen at all times...
the function of activity: The activity facilitates translation and navigation:Search, menu, navigate, history, handwriting, options, text entry, paste, language swap, and settings management for user interaction and feedback.
